# clang trunk: unreachable "Unknown unary operator lvalue!" in EmitUnaryOpLValue during codegen of postfix decrement on _Complex float as inline asm input

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173672
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, confirmed, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/53YKnfM34

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console

```

## Code
```c
typedef union {
  _Complex float cf;
  long long ll;
} ucf;

void foo(ucf *in, ucf *out, _Complex float r) {
  int i;
  ucf ucf1;
  _Complex float cf;

  ucf1.ll = in[i].ll;
  __asm("" : "=r"(cf) : "r"(ucf1.ll));
  cf *= r;
  __asm("" : "=r"(ucf1.ll) : "r"(cf--));
  out[i].ll = ucf1.ll;
}
```

## Code
```c
typedef union {
  _Complex float cf;
  long long ll;
} ucf;

void foo(ucf *in, ucf *out, _Complex float r) {
  int i;
  ucf ucf1;
  _Complex float cf;

  ucf1.ll = in[i].ll;
  __asm("" : "=r"(cf) : "r"(ucf1.ll));
  cf *= r;
  __asm("" : "=r"(ucf1.ll) : "r"(cf--));
  out[i].ll = ucf1.ll;
}
```
